channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Reps Deputy Speaker Urges Media to Report on Parliamentary Activities
item.description: The Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives, Rt. Hon. Ahmed Lawan, has called on the media to balance reporting on Nigeria's achievements with accountability in governance. In a speech addressi...

item.title: A 228-year-old London restaurant surviving through centuries of change
item.description: The article explores the history of a London restaurant established in 1802, highlighting its survival through centuries of societal and architectural changes. Despite challenges like urban developmen...

item.title: Joint Police-Army Operation Results in Death of Four Dawlah Islamiya Linked Outlaws
item.description: In a joint police-Army operation in Cotabato, four members of a criminal gang associated with the Dawlah Islamiya were killed during clashes with law-enforcers. The operation, which spanned two days, ...

item.title: Chhattisgarh girl's suicide linked to shoplifting accusation and police action
item.description: A 17-year-old girl from Chhattisgarh's Baikunthpur died by suicide after being accused of shoplifting, according to police. Her family alleges that the supermarket owners confiscated her scooter and d...

item.title: High Court Halts Baringo County PSB Recruitment Panel
item.description: The High Court in Nakuru has halted the operations of a panel established to recruit, vet, and appoint members for the Baringo County Public Service Board (PSB). The panel, which was tasked with ensur...

item.title: Senegal's Political Shifts and Their Impact on Governance
item.description: The article discusses Senegal's three political transitions since 2000, highlighting the shift from peaceful to violent power changes. While the country maintains its ability to transfer power through...

item.title: Leaders' declining decorum and the erosion of political respect
item.description: The article critiques the diminishing standards of political behaviour, highlighting how leaders like Anthony Albanese and Donald Trump have contributed to a culture where public figures openly disreg...

item.title: Philippines extends Civil Registration and Vital Statistics Decade to 2030 to align with SDGs
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. has officially extended the Civil Registration and Vital Statistics (CRVS) Decade from 2024 to 2030, aiming to enhance birth and death registration systems an...

item.title: Ekurhuleni officials apply for bail after arrest
item.description: Ekurhuleni's suspended HR head Linda Gxasheka and former municipal manager Imogen Mashazi are set to apply for bail at Germiston magistrate’s court on Friday, July 10, 2026. The officials were arreste...

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Cases Rise in Louisiana Amid Health Concerns
item.description: Louisiana health officials are monitoring an increase in cyclosporiasis cases, a parasitic intestinal illness linked to contaminated food or water. The Louisiana Department of Health (LDH) confirmed 2...

item.title: Joint operation results in killing of four terrorists near Karak-Kohat border
item.description: In a joint operation between Karak and Kohat police, four terrorists affiliated with the 'Commander Zahid Group' were killed near the border area of Khattak Dam. The operation, based on credible intel...

item.title: Justin Baldoni and Blake Lively Reach Settlement After Legal Dispute
item.description: Justin Baldoni and Blake Lively have reached a settlement following their legal dispute, which concluded without proceeding to court. The case, initially filed by Lively in December 2024, alleged that...

item.title: Wedding Photography of the 1930s Reflects Resilience and Elegance Amid Economic Hardship
item.description: The 1930s, marked by the Great Depression's economic collapse, saw widespread unemployment and financial strain. Despite these challenges, wedding photographs from the era reveal a striking contrast b...

item.title: Amit Shah Directs Border Police to Monitor Unusual Population Shifts
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah has instructed police in border districts to promptly report any 'abnormal' demographic changes caused by factors like undocumented migration. Speaking at a conference wi...

item.title: David Ndii Faces Criticism for Not Responding to Nephew's Messages After Sharing WhatsApp Chat
item.description: Presidential Council of Economic Advisors chairperson David Ndii has become a talking point after sharing WhatsApp screenshots of a student he sponsors, revealing his lack of response to her urgent me...

item.title: Rain and Windstorm Forecasted in Pakistan's Upper Regions Over Weekend
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued warnings about heavy rainfall, windstorms, and thundershowers in the upper regions of the country, including Gilgit-Baltistan, Kashmir, and Khyb...

item.title: Digital Payments Revolutionize Nigeria's Food Industry
item.description: The Nigerian foodservice sector, valued at $11.09 billion in 2025, is undergoing a major shift from traditional cash transactions to digital payment systems. This transformation is driven by the adopt...

item.title: Persona 4 Revival Producer Discusses Character Adjustments for Modern Sensitivity
item.description: The producer of Persona 4 Revival, Kazuhisa Wada, revealed that minor adjustments will be made to characters to align with contemporary values without altering core story elements. While the narrative...

item.title: Patients Denied Access to Unapproved Cancer Treatments Should Learn from AIDS Activists' Fight
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing struggle of patients denied access to experimental cancer treatments, urging them to draw parallels with the historical fight by AIDS activists in the 1980s. It highl...

item.title: The Role of Accountability in Building Trustworthy Brands in Tanzania
item.description: The article emphasizes that accountability is crucial for brands to build trust, rather than relying solely on marketing and visibility. It argues that true brand strength is tested during challenges,...
